raw_consumer_statement: I filed a dispute on XX/XX/XXXX with Citi regarding a charge on my credit card. I had cancelled an appointment, but the merchant did not refund me for the cancelled appointment nor did they respond to any emails. I gave all of this information and support to Citi but they sided with the merchant on XX/XX/XXXX. On XX/XX/XXXX, I submitted my appeal to this decision via email with all the support, including how the merchant had lied about not having my contact information. Citi reopened my dispute appeal on XX/XX/XXXX and have reached back out to the merchant for response. I wanted to document this incident with the CFPB as I think Citi should have sided with me in the first place given the support provided. I am truly hoping that in the appeal, they do right by the customer.
